component.name: IRGEZTNE Workspace
component.summary: Desktop workspace for browsing, writing, editing, and publishing preparation

description.p: IRGEZTNE Workspace is an early preview desktop workspace for browsing, writing, editing, organizing projects, and preparing web content for future publishing.
The current preview includes a browser workspace shell, editor, notes, files/source library, project tools, and publishing preparation modules.
Early preview builds are not code-signed yet.
